summary: Replayed ADR 0256 from refreshed mainline release 0.177.98 using committed source 85d330315274610b7186a3a7f7763cb5fa312c90 after confirming origin/main still remained at 7afd0b6e0798b93c475581ac316dd6e35c46514e, re-verifying the Matrix Synapse PostgreSQL databases, the shared Docker runtime plus public edge publication path, the private controller bootstrap flow, and the public management-room smoke for the repo-managed mautrix Discord and WhatsApp bridges. This exact-main replay justifies the platform-version bump from 0.130.64 to 0.130.65.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest -q tests/test_matrix_synapse_playbook.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_postgres_role.py tests/test_matrix_synapse_runtime_role.py` passed, `make syntax-check-matrix-synapse` passed, and `python3 -m py_compile scripts/matrix_admin_register.py scripts/matrix_bridge_smoke.py` passed on the synchronized tree.

verification.check: Repository release and canonical truth integration
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with requests python scripts/release_manager.py --bump patch ...` cut repo release `0.177.98`, populated the ADR 0256 changelog note, refreshed the release notes, and carried the rebased branch metadata onto the newest `origin/main` baseline before the exact-main replay.

`make converge-matrix-synapse` succeeded from source commit `85d330315274610b7186a3a7f7763cb5fa312c90` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=167 changed=12 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=37 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `localhost : ok=21 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=3 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=39 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=63 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=20 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `proxmox-host : ok=34 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=23 rescued=0 ignored=0`; the successful transcript is recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0256-mainline-converge-matrix-synapse-0.177.98.txt`.

verification.check: Controller bootstrap and public bridge verification
verification.observed: The exact-main replay re-verified the shared-secret admin bootstrap through `http://100.64.0.1:8015` and the public management-room smoke on `https://matrix.example.com`, with both repo-managed bridge bots answering through the governed playbook path.

This receipt supersedes `2026-03-30-adr-0256-mautrix-bridges-live-apply` as the canonical Matrix bridge receipt because the successful replay now comes from the synchronized merged-main source instead of the workstream branch.

notes: The exact-main replay reused the fixed public verifier path that now hits `/_matrix/client/versions`, caches a verified access token, and respects Synapse login throttling instead of burning the public password budget on every replay.
Both bridge images remain pinned to stable digest-backed tags rather than floating `latest` aliases: Discord `v0.7.6` and WhatsApp `v0.2603.0`.

The shared Docker runtime and NGINX edge still show low-level churn in the exact-main replay because the release cut republishes generated docs and changelog artifacts, but the Matrix runtime, bridge containers, controller proxy, and public management-room verification all passed from the merged-main commit.
